meaning: n.线,细绳,一串,一行v.排成一列
examples: He went off to change a guitar string.
He held out a small bag tied with string.
They danced to the music of a string quartet.
She whispers blessings into a string bracelet before attaching it to the wrist of a devotee.
It was more like a string of arrests for throwing cream pies in the mayors face.
